title: Pinus rigensis
intro: There is not enough information available on the plant Pinus rigensis.
taxonomy: Pinus rigensis is classified as a species of pine tree within the Pinus genus. It belongs to the family Pinaceae, which consists of coniferous trees. The Pinus rigensis is also a member of the Pinus subgenus, which is characterized by its pine cones and needle-like leaves. Further classification places it in the subsection Pinus, which is a group of pine trees that produce large, single seeds. Overall, its classification reflects its close relationship to other pine species within the Pinus genus.
